title: Behaverse task config
description: One self-contained JSON per task. Lives at Assets/Scenes/<SceneName>/Resources/<TaskId>.json. ParameterInfos / Blocks / Timelines / Rules are all under one roof.

Id.description: Short task ID; matches the folder name.

Scene.description: Unity scene name (defaults to task folder name).

ParameterInfos.description: Parameter type/range definitions, keyed by parameter name.

EnumDefinitions.description: Named enum string lists. Reference by name from ParameterInfos.

Presets.description: Named complex-object presets. Used with Object-typed parameters.

Rules.description: Ruleset name -> Instruction[]. Often built from inline `rules:` blocks inside Timelines.

Timelines.description: Timeline name -> Timeline (an ordered list of block references).

Type.description: Parameter kind. Active: int, float, bool, enum, color, string, object. Obsolete: nullonly. Matched case-insensitively at runtime.

Values.description: For enum Type: inline string array OR string referencing an EnumDefinitions key.

Type.description: Distribution kind. Active: bernoulli, uniform, normal, poisson, weighted. Obsolete: exponential.
Sequence kind. Built-in active: ordered, int, repeat. Obsolete: markov. Tasks may register custom kinds (e.g. NBack, Regex) via SequenceConverter.RegisterSequenceConverter.
Adaptive algorithm. Active: SingleStaircase, SampledUpdateRule. Obsolete: DeltaRuleUpdate.

ExitRule.description: Dispatched by which key is present (Trials / Blocks / Time), not by Type.

ValueGenerator.description: A parameter's value-source. Scalar/array literals are valid, or an object dispatched by key (Distribution / Sequence / Reference / Generate / Operation). Tasks may add custom keys.

BlockDefinition.description: One game block. Defines per-trial parameters, optional explicit trial overrides, exit rules, and adaptive algorithms.

TrialOrder.description: Optional explicit trial-order. Either an array of integer indices into Trials, or a ValueGenerator (e.g. {Distribution: ...} for randomized order).

Timeline.description: An ordered list of block references, plus timeline-level exit rules and adaptive algorithms.

Blocks.description: Block references. Each item is a GameBlock by name, an inline InstructionBlock (Instructions:...), an inline BreakBlock (WaitMessage:...), or a TimelineBlock (Type: Timeline + Name).

TimelineBlock.description: An entry in a Timeline.Blocks list.

Name.description: GameBlock name reference (resolved against top-level Blocks).

Type.description: Set to 'Timeline' to nest another timeline by name.

Timeline.description: Used by TimelineBlock to point at another timeline.

Rules.description: Optional inline rules; deduplicated into top-level Rules at merge/load time.

rules.description: Lowercase variant of Rules (accepted at runtime).

rulesName.description: Resolved rule reference (set automatically when inline rules are deduplicated).
